zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert Markham於大約1325年出生在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾馬卡姆 克林頓時，他的父親John Markham36歲，母親Joan Bothumsell18歲。他於1360年與Isabelle de Caunton結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1374年在他的家鄉享年50歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾馬卡姆 克林頓。

nameMeanings.name: Markham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Markham Clinton or East Markham (Nottinghamshire). The placename derives from Old English mearc ‘mark, boundary’ + hām ‘village, homestead’ or hamm ‘water meadow’.

Irish: English surname used as an equivalent of Gaelic Ó Marcacháin ‘descendant of Marcachán’, a diminutive of Marcach ‘horseman, rider’ (see Markey ). This was originally a Galway surname but is now found mainly in Clare, sometimes translated into English as Ryder .

variants.name: Markey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Donal, Donovan, Fergal.
Irish (Monaghan): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Marcaigh ‘descendant of Marcach’, a name meaning ‘horseman, knight’, from marc ‘horse’. Compare Markham 2.
English: apparently from a placename meaning ‘boundary river’ in Old or Middle English, but no such place has been identified.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert Markham was born about 1325, in Markham Clinton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Markham, was 36 and his mother, Joan Bothumsell, was 18. He married Isabelle de Caunton in 1360. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1374, in his hometown, at the age of 50, and was buried in Markham Clinton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert Markham est né environ 1325, à Markham Clinton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Markham, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Joan Bothumsell, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Isabelle de Caunton en 1360. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en 1374, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à Markham Clinton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Markhamが約1325年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアマークハム クリントンで生まれた時，父John Markhamは36歳，母Joan Bothumsellは18歳であった。1360年にIsabelle de Cauntonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1374年に故郷で50歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアマークハム クリントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Markham(이)가 대략 1325년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 마카 클린턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Markham(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Bothumsell(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1360년 Isabelle de Caunton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1374년 그의 고향에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 마카 클린턴에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert Markham родился около 1325 г. в местности мархам клинтон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Markham было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Bothumsell, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabelle de Caunton в 1360 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в 1374 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности мархам клинтон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.
